_meta.name: failurelog-ghost-detection-post
_meta.description: Expected DB state AFTER poll-stale-calls hits the 404 path on the ghost row from 1340-failurelog-pre.json. The writer mints a parent Session(status=GHOST) with the documented skipStages, attaches the Call back to the Session, and writes a FailureLog(kind=GHOST_NEVER_CONNECTED) child carrying the callId / externalId / ageSeconds payload. The Tune tab can now render a FAILED card; ADAPT can now read the FailureLog to soft-acknowledge in the n+1 prompt.

calls._note: Same row as pre — endedAt/endSource set by markPollFailed (existing behaviour); sessionId is the NEW link to the parent Session this slice mints.

sessions._note: Minted by writeGhostFailureLog when the Call had no sessionId. kind=VOICE_CALL (the row WAS a voice call attempt); status=GHOST (epic #1338 §rules). countsTowardLearnerNumber=false — ghost doesn't push the visible call counter. skipStages = documented FAILURE_SESSION_SKIP_STAGES.

_expected_state_post_fix.narrative: Ghost row no longer invisible. Session(status=GHOST) is the parent the Tune tab reads to render a FAILED card. FailureLog child carries the forensic payload AND drives extractFailureAdaptation's soft signal on the next ADAPT run.

ciCheck.name: session-ghost-without-failurelog
ciCheck.rationale: Slice 1 writes Session and FailureLog together; the WARN check should return 0 on a clean DB. Non-zero indicates the best-effort write failed mid-flight (Slice 5 reconciler closes the gap).
